setup:
REGISTRY="$HOME/.superset/kibana-ports.json"
  TEMPLATE="$HOME/kibana/config/kibana.dev.yml"

  [ -f "$REGISTRY" ] || echo '{}' > "$REGISTRY"

  PORT=$(python3 - <<'PYEOF'
  import json, sys, os

  registry_path = os.path.expanduser("~/.superset/kibana-ports.json")
  workspace_id = os.environ.get("SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_ID", "")
  port_min, port_max = 5601, 5699

  if not workspace_id:
      print("", end=""); sys.exit(1)

  with open(registry_path) as f:
      registry = json.load(f)

  if workspace_id in registry:
      print(registry[workspace_id]); sys.exit(0)

  used = set(str(v) for v in registry.values())
  for port in range(port_min, port_max + 1):
      if str(port) not in used:
          registry[workspace_id] = str(port)
          with open(registry_path, "w") as f:
              json.dump(registry, f, indent=2)
          print(port); sys.exit(0)

  print("", end=""); sys.exit(1)
  PYEOF
  )

  DEV_YML="${SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_PATH:?SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_PATH is not set}/config/kibana.dev.yml"
  mkdir -p "${SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_PATH}/config"
  if [ -f "$TEMPLATE" ]; then
      { echo "server.port: $PORT"; echo ""; grep -v '^server\.port:' "$TEMPLATE"; } > "$DEV_YML"
  else
      echo "server.port: $PORT" > "$DEV_YML"
  fi

  cd "${SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_PATH}"
  export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"
  [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
  nvm use
  yarn kbn bootstrap
  echo "Setup complete. Kibana will run on http://localhost:$PORT"
run:
set -euo pipefail

  cd "${SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_PATH:?SUPERSET_WORKSPACE_PATH is not set}"
  export NVM_DIR="${NVM_DIR:-$HOME/.nvm}"
  [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
  nvm use
  yarn es snapshot &
  ES_PID=$!
  trap "kill $ES_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT

  PORT=5601
  until python3 -c "
  import socket
  for p in [${PORT}, ${PORT}+1]:
      s = socket.socket(); s.bind(('', p)); s.close()
  " 2>/dev/null; do
    PORT=$((PORT + 1))
  done

  yarn start --server.port=$PORT
